# Marevo Labs

> Web and mobile development for local businesses in Southeastern Michigan.

Marevo Labs is a web and mobile application development agency based in Southeastern Michigan, founded by two experienced software engineers — Kevin S. (Northville, MI) and Tony M. (Manchester, MI). We partner with small to mid-sized businesses in the Ann Arbor, Plymouth, Canton, Novi, Saline, Dexter, Chelsea, Northville, Manchester, and surrounding areas to build modern, custom digital solutions.

Our approach is partnership-driven and educational. We focus on clear communication, customized solutions, and empowering local businesses with technology they might not otherwise have access to.
